meaning: n.祭坛,(基督教教堂内的)圣坛,祈祷祭拜的地方
examples: He genuflected in front of the altar.
The altar was flanked by two Christmas trees.
The white dove of innocence fluttered over the altar.
Bowls of fruit and vegetables were brought from the altar, along with mugs of coffee and barley tea.
So far 3PAR management seems happy to sacrifice profits at the altar of growth.
